title: China’s Popular Electric Vehicles Have Put Europe’s Automakers on Notice
content: By selling battery-powered S.U.V.s and luxury sedans in places like Germany and Norway, China is striving to become a force in the global auto industry.

title: What if It Never Gets Easier to Be a Working Parent?
content: The shock of the pandemic threw care taking arrangements into disarray. Many families find themselves back in the same precarious arrangement they had before, with the burden still on mothers.

content: The carrier blamed bad weather and staffing shortages. It was the second airline this month to face significant disruptions.
